details: The agent correctly fetched PR data, CI checks, and comments via appropriate tool calls. It accurately reported: title 'Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping', author joshavant, PR status (merged), the correct CI breakdown (20 success, 4 failed, 7 skipped out of 41 total), and summarized the one comment from greptile-apps[bot] with a 5/5 confidence score approving the merge. All data matches the tool outputs without hallucination.
